name: kasulik-ai-plugins
description: AI plugins for small and medium businesses. 37 skills across tourism, marketing, sales, operations, strategy, and AI workflow coaching. Built by Kasulik AI (kasulik.ai).

plugins.name: kasulik-ai-workflows
plugins.description: AI workspace setup, coaching, and assistant creation. Start with /alusta or /agendid to create your personalized AI assistant.

plugins.description: 20 skills for copywriting, SEO, email sequences, pricing, outreach, competitive intel, and brand voice.

plugins.description: 4 skills for customer responses, knowledge base articles, process documentation, and process optimization.
